reviews.review_description: Its a great Idea and I would truly love this app. The Issue is it is not worth $26cad a month and I cant see anyone paying that. If was a one time purchase for $15-20 I would buy in a heart beat. Otherwise app development appears dead and workouts are locked behind monthly sub. So 2 stars? Could easily be 5 for me because this is what im looking for, full body vr workout

developer_response.body:
We are currently performing some internal refactorings, the app is not dead fortunately. If there is any feature you would like, please request it.

There is a free set of two workouts you can repeat forever, no subscription needed. In case you want to unlock full set of workouts, we do require a subscription.

reviews.review_description: Was looking for an app to make things fun when working out. It will let you access any app you can think of whether it is music or media. You can log in real quick start whenever then jump right into your work-out.

developer_response.body: How can we make it a 5 star for you?

reviews.review_description: I was looking for exercise apps and this one actually works your entire body and core. Love it!!
